headline: Otis Worldwide (OTIS) Beat In Q2, Is The 25% Undervaluation Case Still Compelling?
summary: Otis Worldwide (OTIS) has just reported its second quarter 2026 results, giving investors fresh detail on how the elevator and escalator business is holding up alongside a completed share buyback tranche. See our latest analysis for Otis Worldwide. Despite the Q2 earnings beat and ongoing buybacks, Otis Worldwide’s share price has retreated, with the stock down 11.42% on a 90 day share price return basis and the 1 year total shareholder return down 18.82%, suggesting momentum has been fading...

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Otis Worldwide, Lowers Price Target to $95
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Alexander Virgo   maintains Otis Worldwide (NYSE:OTIS) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $100 to $95.
